html:
March 31, 2026

Wisconsin River at 7,170 cfs with falling flows; fair fishing rated 4/10

The Wisconsin River at Rothschild is running at 7,170 cubic feet per second with a gage height of 16.51 feet. Flows dropping on WI River — Rothschild (-21%), Big Rib River (-54%), Big Eau Pleine (-65%) — clarity improving. Steady barometric pressure, high of 56°F expected, best fishing window 11:09 a.m.–1:09 p.m. Coming up Saturday, April 4: Inland Trout Harvest Opener.

Ice-out approaching — use caution on ice

View full river conditions, fishing forecast and more →

Data from USGS, National Weather Service and Solunar.org. Updated every 30 minutes.
